name: peeptrend
description: PeepTrend tools for YouTube gaming trend research, Steam opportunity discovery, and creator planning. Free checks can run with public limits; set PEEPTREND_API_KEY for account-aware tools.

plugins.name: peeptrend-youtube-gaming-trend-finder
plugins.description: Find rising Steam games and YouTube content opportunities before the niche gets crowded. Set PEEPTREND_API_KEY from PeepTrend Profile for full reports and account-aware limits.
